What we do

Roofing services, done properly

From a single slipped tile to a complete re-roof, we cover every job across Derby & Nottingham — pitched and flat.

New Roofs & Re-Roofing

Full roof replacements and new builds using quality tiles and felt, built to last for decades.

Roof Repairs

Slipped tiles, leaks, storm damage and ridge work — fast, tidy repairs that stop the problem.

Flat Roofing

Long-life EPDM rubber and GRP fibreglass flat roofs for extensions, garages and dormers.

Chimney & Repointing

Chimney repairs, rebuilds, flashing and lead work to keep water where it belongs.

Guttering, Fascias & Soffits

New and replacement uPVC guttering, fascias and soffits — clean lines and proper drainage.

Free Roof Surveys

An honest inspection and a clear written quote — no pressure, no obligation, no surprises.

Before → After
Recent project · Derby & Nottingham

Full Roof Strip & Re-Slate

An old, weathered slate roof stripped right back and replaced with a brand-new natural slate covering — complete with new guttering and a crisp, clean line across the eaves.

  • Worn slates fully stripped and replaced
  • New guttering, fascias & clean eaves detail
  • Watertight, weatherproof finish built to last

Why choose us

Local roofers you can actually trust

1

Local & Established

Based in the heart of Derby & Nottingham — we know the houses, the weather and the right way to do the job.

2

Fully Insured Work

Public liability cover and proper safety practice on every job, big or small. Total peace of mind.

3

Honest, Upfront Quotes

A clear written price before we start. No hidden extras, no pushy sales — just a fair job at a fair price.

4

Tidy & Reliable

We turn up when we say we will, protect your property and leave the site clean when we're done.

Meet the team

The roofers behind the work

Derby & Nottingham Roofing is a local, family-run roofing company built on doing things the right way. We've grown by word of mouth — one happy customer at a time — and we treat every roof like it's our own.

Whether it's a quick repair or a full re-roof, you'll deal with the same friendly team from the first survey to the final clean-up. No call centres, no middlemen, no nonsense.
